events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the root cause is a cold-alignment procedure that ignored the calculated thermal growth offset, so the shaft/coupling runs misaligned once the machine reaches operating temperature — a known driver of premature coupling, bearing, and seal failure. Flagged as `fail` / `high` risk with corrective actions (hot-alignment verification, recompute thermal growth targets, re-align, review vibration trend data) per API 686 and laser-system practice.
